description:
The Game of Life is more unpredictable than ever. But now, be prepared for what comes next with insurance plans from ICICI Lombard.

Know more: https://bit.ly/3I9rrmB

comments.text: Navigating insurance claims can be a maze, but silence isn't the answer. Reported my claim, met with a false explanation & closed doors.Re-reported, yet the team & even the CEO of ICICI Lombard remain quiet. Where's the accountability? #InsuranceWoes #ICICILombard #Sanjeevmantri

comments.text:
This is a fraudulent company they book my policy of 2 cars with the wrong policy and cancelled my both policies and after 20 days they didn't refund my money. Be aware not to book a single policy from this company. I call the customer care but they are not responding to my queries. My policy no is 3005/328692481/00/000 and 3005/328692464/00/000. CHOR COMPANY.
Mera 2 policy 1116 and 1100 rs ki thi. Agar me 1 lakh ka policy book karta and Aisa hota to ky. 1 lakh ye chor company kha leta?? Ye Paisa refund q Nehi hoga?? Policy cancel hai refund milna chaiye. Q ki me bhat din wait Kiya parivahan portal me reflect Nehi hua is liye me doara dusra company se book kar liya .Mujhe Mera Paisa refund chaiye. Nehi to me pura apka company ka band Baja dunga.
comments.author: @Sk.Arobilla
